hero.title: We’re here for every little paw problem.
hero.subtitle: Reach out to the Pawmie team with questions about bookings, services, or ideas for new features.

channels.label: Email support
channels.description: Best for questions about how the demo works or for feedback.

channels.label: Demo helpline
channels.description: Use this in mockups to show a support phone number (no real calls).

channels.label: Studio address
channels.value: Pawmie Studio, Paw Street, Demo City
channels.description: A fictional address used only for UI and layout purposes.

officeHours.title: Demo office hours
lines: Sunday & public holidays: Response times may be slower.

faq.question: Is this a real service?
faq.answer: This is a demo project for learning and UI exploration. You can connect it to real backends later.

faq.question: Where do my bookings go?
faq.answer: All bookings in this demo are stored locally in your browser using localStorage, not on a remote server.

faq.question: Can I customise Pawmie for my clinic?
faq.answer: Yes. You can replace this dummy JSON with your own content, services, and branding as you build a real product.
